title: Toprak ve Mırnav

sidekick.name: Mırnav
sidekick.description: a playful short-haired kitten with black-and-white tuxedo markings (white chest, white paws, black back and head), bright blue eyes, small pink nose and pads, young kitten proportions. Always the SAME tuxedo kitten — never gray, never orange, never long-haired.

description: Toprak için Mırnav sadece bir kedi değildi... küçük patileri, mavi gözleri ile en iyi dostuydu. Onunla gizli köşeleri keşfetmeyi, ona nazikçe dokunmayı öğrendi. İşte Toprak'ın ilk dostluk masalı.
style: Ice Age and Shrek style 3D CGI animation with exaggerated cute proportions, hyper-detailed textures, subsurface skin scattering, volumetric lighting, vibrant warm color palette, photorealistic fabric wrinkles, cinematic composition, Disney Pixar render quality

characterDescription.base: Turkish child. Exact face, hair, skin tone, and accessories come from the character-profile reference photo. No hardcoded physical traits — the reference photo is the sole source of truth for identity.

scenes.title: Sabah Neşesi
scenes.text: Toprak, sabah ışığıyla uyandı. Pencereden cıvıl cıvıl kuş sesleri geliyordu.
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC A toddler boy, Toprak, wakes up in his cozy bed, sunlight streaming through the window., setting: Toprak'ın odası, sabah, mood: warm, wide shot, character 30-40% of frame, environment dominant, consistent across all scenes, Pixar 3D CGI animation style with exaggerated cute proportions and hyper-detailed textures, ultra high detail render quality

scenes.title: Meraklı Bakışlar
scenes.text: Annesi, Toprak'ın kahvaltı tabağına taze peynir koydu. O, merakla etrafına bakınıyordu.
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC Toprak sits in his high chair, looking around with wide eyes as his mother places a plate of food., setting: Mutfak, kahvaltı zamanı, mood: curious, wide shot, character 30-40% of frame, environment dominant, consistent across all scenes, Pixar 3D CGI animation style with exaggerated cute proportions and hyper-detailed textures, ultra high detail render quality

scenes.title: Bir Fısıltı
scenes.text: Dışarıdan incecik bir ses geldi. Toprak, duvara yapışık minik bir gölge gördü.
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC Toprak peeks out the kitchen window, noticing a tiny shadow moving on the wall., setting: Mutfak penceresi, öğleden önce, mood: nervous-excited, wide shot, character 30-40% of frame, environment dominant, consistent across all scenes, Pixar 3D CGI animation style with exaggerated cute proportions and hyper-detailed textures, ultra high detail render quality

scenes.title: Minik Dokunuş
scenes.text: Annesi, Toprak'ı bahçeye çıkardı. Yumuşacık çimler ayaklarını gıdıklıyordu.
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC Toprak, wearing day clothes, walks barefoot on soft green grass in the garden., setting: Bahçe, güneşli öğle, mood: dreamy, wide shot, character 30-40% of frame, environment dominant, consistent across all scenes, Pixar 3D CGI animation style with exaggerated cute proportions and hyper-detailed textures, ultra high detail render quality

scenes.title: Pıt Pıt Kalp
scenes.text: Toprak, küçücük bir kedi yavrusu gördü. Kalbi pıt pıt atıyordu, heyecanla ellerini açtı.
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC Toprak spots a tiny kitten, his heart beating fast, and he extends his hands gently., setting: Bahçenin köşesi, öğleden sonra, mood: joyful, wide shot, character 30-40% of frame, environment dominant, consistent across all scenes, Pixar 3D CGI animation style with exaggerated cute proportions and hyper-detailed textures, ultra high detail render quality

scenes.title: İlk Merhaba
scenes.text: Mırnav, minik patileriyle Toprak'ın parmağına dokundu. Toprak, sıcak bir fısıltı duydu.
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC The kitten, Mırnav, gently touches Toprak's finger with its tiny paw., setting: Bahçedeki çiçek tarhı, ikindi, mood: warm, wide shot, character 30-40% of frame, environment dominant, consistent across all scenes, Pixar 3D CGI animation style with exaggerated cute proportions and hyper-detailed textures, ultra high detail render quality

scenes.title: Uyumlu Dostluk
scenes.text: Mırnav, Toprak'ın kucağında uyudu. Toprak, kediye nazikçe sarıldı, sıcacık hissetti.
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC Mırnav sleeps peacefully in Toprak's lap, and Toprak gently hugs the kitten., setting: Bahçedeki gölgelik, akşamüstü, mood: triumphant-emotional, wide shot, character 30-40% of frame, environment dominant, consistent across all scenes, Pixar 3D CGI animation style with exaggerated cute proportions and hyper-detailed textures, ultra high detail render quality

scenes.title: Oyun Zamanı
scenes.text: Toprak, Mırnav ile ip atladı. Mırnav, topa minik patileriyle vurdu, çok eğlendiler.
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC Toprak plays with Mırnav, tossing a small ball. Mırnav bats at the ball with its paws., setting: Bahçe, oyun alanı, öğleden sonra, mood: joyful, wide shot, character 30-40% of frame, environment dominant, consistent across all scenes, Pixar 3D CGI animation style with exaggerated cute proportions and hyper-detailed textures, ultra high detail render quality

scenes.title: Gece Huzuru
scenes.text: Mırnav, Toprak'ın yatağının kenarında mırıldandı. Toprak, kendini güvende hissetti.
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC Mırnav purrs softly by Toprak's bed. Toprak lies peacefully, feeling safe., setting: Toprak'ın odası, gece, mood: warm, wide shot, character 30-40% of frame, environment dominant, consistent across all scenes, Pixar 3D CGI animation style with exaggerated cute proportions and hyper-detailed textures, ultra high detail render quality

scenes.title: Sonsuz Sevgi
scenes.text: Toprak, Mırnav'ın yumuşacık patilerini sevdi. Kalbinde sonsuz bir sevgi hissetti.
scenes.prompt: CHARACTER_DESC Toprak gently strokes Mırnav's soft paws, a feeling of endless love in his heart., setting: Toprak'ın yatağı, ertesi sabah, mood: triumphant-emotional, wide shot, character 30-40% of frame, environment dominant, consistent across all scenes, Pixar 3D CGI animation style with exaggerated cute proportions and hyper-detailed textures, ultra high detail render quality

funFacts.title: Biliyor muydun? 🐾
facts: Kedilerin her patisinde, parmak izi gibi özel desenler bulunur. Bu desenler her kedide farklıdır.
Kediler, patilerindeki özel bezlerden kokular yayarak bölgelerini işaretlerler. Bu yüzden bazen patilerini objelere sürerler.
Minik kedilerin patileri çok hassastır. Yürürken zemin titreşimlerini bile algılayabilirler, bu da onlara avlarını bulmada yardımcı olur.

funFacts.title: Biliyor muydun? ❤️
facts: İnsanlarla kediler arasındaki dostluk, binlerce yıl öncesine dayanır. Kediler, eski Mısır'da bile çok sevilen hayvanlardı.
Kediler, mırıldanarak kendilerini rahat ve güvende hissederler. Mırıldanma, onların mutluluk dilidir.
Bir kediyi okşamak, hem kedinin hem de insanın kalbini rahatlatır. Bu, aranızdaki sevgiyi güçlendirir.

specialPagePrompts.heroPage: A beautiful premium children's storybook HERO PAGE in 2:3 portrait — themed decorative background matching "Mırnav'ın Yumuşak Patileri". ABSOLUTELY NO CHILD CHARACTER, NO PEOPLE, NO HUMAN FIGURES anywhere on the page. Themed environment: FOREGROUND: Toprak's hands cradling Mırnav. MIDGROUND: Toprak's face, smiling, and Mırnav's curious face. BACKGROUND: A softly blurred, warm, sunny garden setting with a few flowers.. TITLE (display EXACTLY as Turkish text, top 20% of the page): "Hikayemizin Kahramanı Toprak" Typography: large playful HAND-LETTERED decorative title with rainbow/multi-color warm palette, sparkles and floating decorative elements around letters, drop shadow, cheerful children's book cover-level fun. Each word a slightly different warm color (gold, coral, rose, turquoise), letters may have tiny ornaments (stars, hearts, leaves). LAYOUT: title top 20%, LEAVE THE CENTER ~55% OF THE PAGE VISUALLY CALM (soft gradient or soft bokeh, no busy elements, no text, no objects) so a rectangular photo frame can be composited on top later. Bottom 25% may have tasteful themed decorative ornaments, flowers, sparkles, a ribbon. Turkish characters (ş ç ğ ü ö ı İ) MUST be perfect. No other text on page besides the title. Pixar 3D CGI animation style 3D CGI / painterly storybook illustration blend, ultra high detail, magazine-cover polish.
specialPagePrompts.funFactBg: A warm decorative themed background with sparkles and soft glow, NO TEXT NO LETTERS, 3D CGI illustration.
specialPagePrompts.senderNoteBg: A cozy warm background with soft golden light, NO TEXT NO LETTERS, 3D CGI render.
specialPagePrompts.backCover: A warm artistic closing scene matching "Mırnav'ın Yumuşak Patileri". Toprak'ın minik kalbi, Mırnav'ın yumuşacık patileriyle tanıştığında pıt pıt attı. Bu sıcacık dostluk, küçük adımlarla büyüdü, sevgi dolu oyunlara dönüştü. Mırnav ve Toprak, birbirlerine sonsuz bir sevgiyle bağlandılar.. NO TEXT NO LETTERS in image, 3D CGI render.
